rows.leadership_talking_points_json: {"bullets":["We're building an AI-fluent HR function, integrating AI into critical people processes over the next 18 months to reduce admin burden and enhance employee experience.","This strategy aims for significant efficiency gains and improved decision-making, with indicative ROI to be confirmed with Finance as pilots progress.","Our focus is on responsible AI adoption, ensuring ethical use and data privacy.
